typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	Data_Src as string (),
	DW_Run_Cncl_Dt as timestamp (),
	DW_Run_Eff_dt as timestamp (),
	DW_Run_Key as integer (),
	DW_Run_Month as integer (),
	monthyear as string (),
	new_Data as string (),
	NoOfMonths as string (),
	Password as string (),
	projectResourceSK as integer (),
	projectSK as integer (),
	SQL as string (),
	SQL1 as string (),
	taskCategoryTypeSK as integer (),
	timesheetdateSK as timestamp (),
	timesheetmonth as integer (),
	timesheetyear as integer (),
	User_Name as string (),
	var_BCC as string (),
	var_CC as string (),
	var_Dest_Conn as string (),
	var_Email_From as string (),
	var_Email_Subject as string (),
	var_Email_To as string (),
	var_Error_Description as string (),
	var_Error_Flag as integer (),
	var_Initial_Catalog as string (),
	var_SMTP_Server as string ()
}

source(output(
		TimeSheetDate as timestamp,
		TimeTaken as integer,
		TimeSheetProjectSK as integer,
		TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK as integer,
		TimeSheetDateSK as timestamp,
		TimeTakenHR as integer,
		TimeSheetSK as integer,
		TimeSheetID as integer,
		TimeSheetTitle as string,
		TimeSheetMajorTaskSK as integer,
		TimeSheetProjectResourceSK as integer,
		TimeSheetTaskCategorySK as integer,
		TimeSheetMinorTaskSk as integer,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Create_Datetime as timestamp,
		DW_Update_Datetime as timestamp,
		TimeSheetDefectSk as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        dw.F_TimeSheet.* FROM            dw.F_TimeSheet  where   TimeSheetProjectResourceSK = ? AND  datepart(mm,TimeSheetDateSK)=? AND datepart(yyyy,TimeSheetDateSK)=?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLESRCOldData
OLESRCOldData derive({Month-Year} = toString(month(TimeSheetDate)) + '-' + toString(year(TimeSheetDate))) ~> DERForMonthYear
DERForMonthYear aggregate(groupBy(TimeSheetProjectSK,TimeSheetProjectResourceSK,TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK,{Month-Year}),
	TimeTakenHR = sum(TimeTakenHR),
		TimeTaken = sum(TimeTaken),
		TimeSheetDateSK = max(TimeSheetDateSK)) ~> Aggregate
Aggregate derive(DW_run_Key = $User__DW_Run_Key) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn sink(input(
		AM_TimeSheetMonthYear as string,
		AM_TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK as integer,
		TimeTaken as integer,
		AM_TimeSheetProjectResourceSK as integer,
		AM_TimeSheetProjectSK as integer,
		AM_MAXDateOfMonth as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TimeTakenHR as integer,
		DW_Run_Key as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		AM_TimeSheetMonthYear = {Month-Year},
		AM_TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK = TimeSheetTaskCategoryTypeSK,
		TimeTaken,
		AM_TimeSheetProjectResourceSK = TimeSheetProjectResourceSK,
		AM_TimeSheetProjectSK = TimeSheetProjectSK,
		AM_MAXDateOfMonth = TimeSheetDateSK,
		TimeTakenHR,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_run_Key)) ~> OLEDSTInsertnewAM
